nodes.label: AI as foundational structure provider
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for complex context
nodes.grounding_span: AI will often not understand the context correctly and might make assumptions which are either not useful or entirely invalid

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI is great for implementations in Python... but it might struggle even with simple implementations for Power BI in DAX

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: It needs nudges along the way, where you adjust the approach, disambiguate areas of confusion and approve or reject the suggested changes

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I also don't like to use AI at the early brainstorming stages of an implementation and prefer to come up with an approach myself

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: AI saves me time and allows me to be more productive at work

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: AI is lacking the human ingenuity and creativity needed to come up with novel ideas

nodes.label: Productivity and efficient task completion
nodes.grounding_span: saving you the time to research, come up with an implementation approach

nodes.label: Professional autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I try to be as involved as possible in the space and learn how AI models operate

nodes.label: Quality and accuracy of work output
nodes.grounding_span: find a solution that works as intended

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for personal communication
nodes.grounding_span: no matter how well I try to explain something to the AI, it just doesn't seem to get it

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: A concise and elegant solution to a complex prompt in one go, saving you the time

nodes.label: Confidence in AI as a key skill
nodes.grounding_span: I believe that I have reached a satisfactory level

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI's future improvement in specialized domain
nodes.grounding_span: I believe that the capabilities of AI models have reached a plateau

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: start off with a straight-forward prompt and give more hints along the way

nodes.label: Domain-specific delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: AI is great for implementations in Python... but it might struggle even with simple implementations for Power BI in DAX
